action.reasoning: Observation: iter26 failed with hf_hub LocalEntryNotFoundError (timm resnet50 weights download attempt, network disabled + cache miss) + truncated train.py; best remains 0.6537 bal_acc (RN50 cRT+Focal gamma2+mix/cut-rand-p0.5+RandAug+sqrt-s1-60ep-AdamW5e-4-cos+CE-count-s2-40ep-SGD0.05-nesterov+tau=1.7 grid from iter24). ConvNeXt switch incompatible without stem mods. Analysis: torchvision.resnet50(IMAGENET1K_V2) is pre-cached per env spec and avoids hf; CIFAR stem (3x3/stride1+no maxpool) improves feat maps vs default ImageNet stem on 32x32. Full clean train.py (exact iter24 recipe + label_smoothing=0.1 in s2 CE, named_param freeze+fc reinit after best s1, per-epoch val + per-20step loss logging to metrics.jsonl, complete mix/cut logic, best-save+tau grid 0-3@0.05, seeds, weights_only=False compat) will recover/exceed 0.6537. Robust predict.py ensures batched norm+tau adj works offline. Decision: Overwrite model.py/train.py/predict.py with complete codes, run python train.py (~6min OK), submit_eval on best.pt immediately (targets >0.65 bal_acc, fits 1.27h/4 iters left, follows >20ep rule).
